data.body: TS2 (09f9) completion-verifier FAILED on close (AC5: no test for KEY_REVOKE intra-commit refinement — impl handled it, test missing). Added test_intra_commit_key_revoked_before_event_invalid to test_identity_ts2_09f9_heldout.py (3 intra-commit tests now GREEN). Folded into e165''=9219a4930 (change 563) via mid-stack amend + rebase. TS3(117b)+TS4(b134) already CLOSED. Re-pushed: 563/576/579/580/581 got new patchsets (re-CI); 558/560/561 unchanged (still green). Awaiting re-CI green, then re-close 09f9, close epic, submit. LESSON: completion-verifier is strict per-AC-clause incl. symmetric cases — author a test per AC clause.
